title: Your Ticket Is No Longer Valid
original_title: Your Ticket Is No Longer Valid
overview: Set within the super-rich jet-set society of Paris, Richard Harris portrays a man whose life is gradually being destroyed. From sexual trauma to financial disaster, he slowly descends into a world of insanity, perversion and finally the bottomless pit!
